modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Docusign Printer fails to operate after installing PaperCut software.

full_description_text: The user reported that the Docusign Printer stopped working right after they installed the PaperCut software. They were trying to print a document when they noticed the issue. It seems like the installation might have caused some problems with the printer's functionality.
short_description: Docusign Printer fails to operate after installing PaperCut software.
description: The user reported that the Docusign Printer stopped working right after they installed the PaperCut software. They were trying to print a document when they noticed the issue. It seems like the installation might have caused some problems with the printer's functionality.
